import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn dedup(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not list.contains(result, v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    mut min_val = 0
    mut found = false
    mut i = 0
    while i < remaining.len()
      match remaining.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if not found
          min_val = v
          found = true
        else if v < min_val
          min_val = v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
    mut new_remaining: List<Int> = []
    mut removed = false
    mut j = 0
    while j < remaining.len()
      match remaining.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if v == min_val and not removed
          removed = true
        else
          new_remaining = list.push(new_remaining, v)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    remaining = new_remaining
  end
  sorted
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_line(line1)
let b = parse_line(line2)

mut combined = a
mut k = 0
while k < b.len()
  match b.get(k)
  when Some(v)
    combined = list.push(combined, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end

let unique = dedup(combined)
let sorted = sort_list(unique)

mut out = ""
mut idx = 0
while idx < sorted.len()
  match sorted.get(idx)
  when Some(v)
    if idx == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end
println(out)
